patches.summary: JSON-parse --parent, --cover, --icon flags in pages create and pages update.
patches.reason: Generator emits raw-string assignment for oneOf/anyOf union fields in the spec; Notion's API requires these as JSON objects, not strings, causing a 400 on any flag-based call.
patches.validated_outcome: pages create --parent '{"type":"page_id","page_id":"..."}' now returns 200; previously returned HTTP 400 validation_error.

patches.summary: Add --markdown flag to pages markdown import that wraps content in the required discriminated union body.
patches.reason: The only interface was --stdin, which required knowing the undiscoverable shape {"type":"replace_content","replace_content":{"new_str":"..."}}. Not mentioned in --help, README, or SKILL.md.
patches.validated_outcome: pages markdown import <id> --markdown '# Title\n\nBody' returns 200 and replaces page content.
